overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a walk through an ancient Mediterranean temple complex. The camera moves from a shaded courtyard with flower stalls, through garden pergolas, and finally approaches a grand temple with massive warrior statues and burning braziers under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with flower displays and columned portico

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a sunlit courtyard past flower displays and wooden benches

notable_agents.action: group of three robed figures standing and conversing under the canopy awning

entered.detail: classical stone building with tall columns and decorative friezes
large terracotta pots with colorful flowers arranged on wooden tables
simple wooden bench sitting against the building wall
fabric sun shade supported by wooden poles extending over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit courtyard of an ancient stone complex. Large terracotta flower pots sit on wooden tables to the left, while a group of robed NPCs converse under a fabric canopy on the right. The camera moves forward toward a columned portico, passing by the stationary figures in a peaceful, sheltered environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded garden walkway with wooden pergolas

events.description: a woman in dark robes walks directly past the camera, temporarily blocking the view of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along a shaded garden path under wooden pergolas with lattice fences

notable_agents.action: woman in long dark robes walking toward the camera then passing by on the right

entered.detail: wooden arbor structure covered with climbing vines creating dappled shade
wooden lattice work fencing lining both sides of the garden path
tall, slender evergreen trees visible beyond the garden walls

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a shaded garden walkway covered by wooden pergolas with climbing vines. The ground changes to cobblestone as the camera moves through the enclosed path. A woman in dark robes walks past the camera, briefly obscuring the view, while tall cypress trees are visible beyond the lattice fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large warrior statues and burning braziers

events.description: exits the shaded garden pergola into a bright open plaza with large stone statues
camera turns left to approach and circle around the large warrior statues

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza admiring the large stone warrior statues and burning braziers

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the statue base looking up at the sculpture

entered.detail: massive stone statues of armored warriors holding spears and swords
low stone retaining wall with bushes and flowers planted along the top
metal fire bowl with flames burning atop a stone pedestal
stone table with baskets and items for offerings or decoration

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shaded garden, the scene opens into a bright sunlit plaza featuring massive stone warrior statues. The camera moves toward these imposing sculptures, passing burning braziers and stone offering tables. An NPC stands near the statue base looking up, while the area is surrounded by stone walls and scattered trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with grand stairs and giant guardian statues

events.description: begins ascending the wide stone stairs leading up to the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs toward the temple entrance, passing between giant warrior statues and a fountain pool

notable_agents.action: robed guard standing still near the base of the temple stairs

entered.detail: grand temple building with tall columns, pediment, and red banners hanging between pillars
wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
crimson fabric banners with gold symbols hanging from the temple columns
rectangular stone basin with water at the base of the warrior statues

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the grand temple entrance with its imposing columned facade and red banners. The camera ascends the wide stone stairs, passing between giant warrior statues that flank a fountain pool. A robed guard stands near the stairs as the scene culminates at the temple threshold, with the massive sculptures now towering overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, intimate courtyard into the expansive, imposing grandeur of a temple plaza. It begins in a sunlit stone courtyard, gliding past terracotta flower pots and robed figures gathered under a fabric canopy toward a columned portico. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a shaded garden walkway where cobblestones replace the open floor and climbing vines drape over wooden pergolas. The scene then opens from the enclosure into a bright, wide plaza, passing burning braziers and massive stone warrior statues that tower over the surrounding walls. Finally, the camera ascends a wide set of stone stairs, passing a fountain pool and a robed guard to culminate at the imposing columned facade of the grand temple.
